home.metaTitle: iCat Studios — Mobile Application and Game Development
home.metaDescription: iCat Studios is a mobile application and game development team established in Türkiye, giving importance to innovation and creativity.
home.heroSubtitle: iCat Studios is a mobile application and game development team established in Türkiye, giving importance to innovation and creativity.
home.productsSectionSubtitle: Check out what we've been building

products.metaDescription: Explore our mobile applications and games.

potentials.name: Potentials: FC26 Career Mode
potentials.description1: Covering every FIFA-FC version from FIFA 18 through FC 26, with detailed data on more than 50,000 men's and women's footballers and nearly 1,000 clubs — the world's most comprehensive and most downloaded app for FC career modes.
potentials.description2: With Potentials, filter players by overall/potential rating, age, market value, position, attributes, club, league, nationality and more. Build squads, compare team details — and so much more, only in this app.
potentials.shortDescription: The world's most popular companion app for FC career modes.

fastAndBlocky.name: Fast and Blocky
fastAndBlocky.description: An endless motorcycle racing game where you avoid randomly generated traffic while riding at high speeds. Navigate through traffic without crashing into vehicles!
fastAndBlocky.shortDescription: Endless motorcycle racing — dodge traffic at high speed.

scoreHunter.name: Score Hunter
scoreHunter.tagline: Not betting — a football prediction game!
scoreHunter.description1: Score Hunter is a free-to-play football prediction game with rewards. You don't need to pay to join the game or win prizes. No risk! No betting terminology! All you need is a passion for football!
scoreHunter.description2: Try to predict match results, or in-match events through fun mini-games. Climb to the top of weekly and seasonal leaderboards with the points you collect. Trophies and surprise prizes are all yours!
scoreHunter.shortDescription: A football prediction game with rewards — built for fans.

swapMap.name: SwapMap: Cards, Stickers, TCG
swapMap.tagline: Trade. Sell. Collect. All on one map.
swapMap.description1: The world’s most comprehensive swap & sell platform for collections, cards, stickers and TCG products. With SwapMap, list your extra items for sale or trade, and post wanted ads for the items you’re looking for.
swapMap.description2: Track listings on the map and easily connect with other collectors nearby. Advanced filters, easy interface. From the closest to the farthest — everything under one roof. That’s what makes SwapMap one of a kind.
swapMap.shortDescription: The world's first global swap & sell platform for collections, cards, stickers and TCG.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us
privacyPolicy.intro: iCat Studios built the apps listed below as a Free app:
privacyPolicy.p1: These SERVICES are provided by iCat Studios at no cost and is intended for use as is.
privacyPolicy.p2: This page is used to inform website visitors regarding our policies with the collection, use, and disclosure of Personal Information if anyone decided to use our Service.
privacyPolicy.p3: If you choose to use our Services, then you agree to the collection and use of information in relation to this policy. The Personal Information that we collect is used for providing and improving the Service. We will not use or share your information with anyone except as described in this Privacy Policy.
privacyPolicy.p4: The terms used in this Privacy Policy have the same meanings as in our Terms and Conditions, which is accessible at aforementioned apps unless otherwise defined in this Privacy Policy.
privacyPolicy.infoCollection1: For a better experience, while using our Service, we may require you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information. The information that we request is will be retained by us and used as described in this privacy policy.
privacyPolicy.infoCollection2: The app does use third party services that may collect information used to identify you.
privacyPolicy.infoCollection3: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the app:
privacyPolicy.logData: We want to inform you that whenever you use our Service, in a case of an error in the app we collect data and information (through third party products) on your phone called Log Data. This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol ("IP") address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing our Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics.
privacyPolicy.cookies1: Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers. These are sent to your browser from the websites that you visit and are stored on your device's internal memory.
privacyPolicy.cookies2: This Service does not use these "cookies" explicitly. However, the app may use third party code and libraries that use "cookies" to collect information and improve their services. You have the option to either accept or refuse these cookies and know when a cookie is being sent to your device. If you choose to refuse our cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of this Service.
privacyPolicy.serviceProviders1: We may employ third-party companies and individuals due to the following reasons:
serviceProvidersReasons: To provide the Service on our behalf
To assist us in analyzing how our Service is used
privacyPolicy.serviceProviders2: We want to inform users of this Service that these third parties have access to your Personal Information. The reason is to perform the tasks assigned to them on our behalf. However, they are obligated not to disclose or use the information for any other purpose.
privacyPolicy.security: We value your trust in providing us your Personal Information, thus we are striving to use commercially acceptable means of protecting it. But remember that no method of transmission over the internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure and reliable, and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
privacyPolicy.links: This Service may contain links to other sites. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that site. Note that these external sites are not operated by us. Therefore, we strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of these websites. We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites or services.
privacyPolicy.children: These Services do not address anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13. In the case we discover that a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, we immediately delete this from our servers. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us so that we will be able to do necessary actions.
privacyPolicy.changes: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Thus, you are advised to review this page periodically for any changes. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. These changes are effective immediately after they are posted on this page.
privacyPolicy.contact: If you have any questions or suggestions about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us.

termOfUse.title: Term of Use
termOfUse.subtitle: Please read carefully before using our services
termOfUse.intro1: The following terms and conditions ("Terms") govern all use of the Potentials: FC26 Career Mode Application and all content, services, and products available at or through the website and our applications, including, but not limited to, Potentials: FC26 Career Mode iOS and Android application Pro Mode (Both iOS and Android), (taken together, our "Services"). Our Services are offered subject to your acceptance without modification of all of the terms and conditions contained herein and all other operating rules, policies (including, without limitation, iCat Studios's Privacy Policy) and procedures that may be published from time to time by iCat Studios (collectively, the "Agreement"). You agree that we may automatically upgrade our Services, and these Terms will apply to any upgrades. Your agreement is with iCat Studios (TR).
termOfUse.intro2: Please read this Agreement carefully before accessing or using our Services. By accessing or using any part of our Services, you agree to become bound by the Terms of this Agreement. If you do not agree to all the Terms of this Agreement, then you may not access or use any of our Services. If these Terms are considered an offer by iCat Studios, acceptance is expressly limited to these Terms.
termOfUse.intro3: Our Services are not directed to children younger than 3, and access and use of our Services is only offered to users 3 years of age or older. If you are under 3 years old, please do not register to use our Services. Any person who registers as a user or provides their personal information to our Services represents that they are 3 years of age or older.
termOfUse.intro4: Use of our Services requires a Potentials: FC26 Career Mode account. You agree to provide us with complete and accurate information when you register for an account. You will be solely responsible and liable for any activity that occurs under your username. You are responsible for keeping your password secure.
termOfUse.section1: If you create an account, review, squad or any other material on Potentials: FC26 Career Mode application, you are responsible for maintaining the security of your account, and you are fully responsible for all activities that occur under the account and any other actions taken in connection with your account. You must immediately notify iCat Studios of any unauthorized uses of your account, or any other breaches of security. iCat Studios will not be liable for any acts or omissions by you, including any damages of any kind incurred as a result of such acts or omissions.
termOfUse.payment1: Optional paid services such as advertisement removal are available (any such services, an "Upgrade" to Potentials: FC26 Career Mode Pro Mode Subscription) in our mobile applications. By selecting an Upgrade you agree to pay iCat Studios the monthly or annual subscription fees indicated for that service. Payments will be charged on a pre-pay basis on the day you sign up or after the trial is over for an Upgrade which will be charged on your "iTunes account" or "Google (Play Store)".
termOfUse.paymentProLabel: Potentials: FC26 Career Mode iOS Application Terms — Potentials Pro Mode Subscription:
termOfUse.payment2: An advertisement free experience which means that we will remove any advertisement including the banner on the bottom and the full screen advertisement and Extended favorites list. Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period. Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase. Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication, where applicable.
termOfUse.section2: iCat Studios has not reviewed, and cannot review, all of the material, including computer software, posted to our Services, and cannot therefore be responsible for that material's content, use or effects. By operating our Services, iCat Studios does not represent or imply that it endorses the material there posted, or that it believes such material to be accurate, useful, or non-harmful. You are responsible for taking precautions as necessary to protect yourself and your computer systems from viruses, worms, Trojan horses, and other harmful or destructive content. Our Services may contain content that is offensive, indecent, or otherwise objectionable, as well as content containing technical inaccuracies, typographical mistakes, and other errors.
termOfUse.section3: This Agreement does not transfer from iCat Studios to you any iCat Studios or third party intellectual property, and all right, title, and interest in and to such property will remain (as between the parties) solely with iCat Studios. iCat Studios, Potentials: FC26 Career Mode Application, logo, and all other trademarks, service marks, graphics and logos used in connection with Potentials: FC26 Career Mode Application or our Services, are trademarks or registered trademarks of iCat Studios or iCat Studios's licensors.
termOfUse.section4: We are constantly updating our Services, and that means sometimes we have to change the legal terms under which our Services are offered. If we make changes that are material, we will let you know by posting on our website, or by sending you an email or other communication before the changes take effect. The notice will designate a reasonable period of time after which the new terms will take effect. If you disagree with our changes, then you should stop using our Services within the designated notice period.
termOfUse.section5: iCat Studios may terminate your access to all or any part of our Services at any time, with or without cause, with or without notice, effective immediately. If you wish to terminate this Agreement or your Potentials: FC26 Career Mode account (if you have one), you may simply discontinue using our Services. All provisions of this Agreement which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
termOfUse.section6: Our Services are provided "as is." iCat Studios and its suppliers and licensors hereby disclaim all warranties of any kind, express or implied, including, without limitation, the warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose and non-infringement. Neither iCat Studios nor its suppliers and licensors, makes any warranty that our Services will be error free or that access thereto will be continuous or uninterrupted. You understand that you download from, or otherwise obtain content or services through, our Services at your own discretion and risk.
termOfUse.section7: Except to the extent applicable law, if any, provides otherwise, this Agreement, any access to or use of our Services will be governed by the laws of Türkiye, excluding its conflict of law provisions, and the proper venue for any disputes arising out of or relating to any of the same will be the state courts located in Europe, Türkiye.
termOfUse.section8: In no event will iCat Studios, or its suppliers or licensors, be liable with respect to any subject matter of this Agreement under any contract, negligence, strict liability or other legal or equitable theory for: (i) any special, incidental or consequential damages; (ii) the cost of procurement for substitute products or services; (iii) for interruption of use or loss or corruption of data; or (iv) for any amounts that exceed the fees paid by you to iCat Studios under this Agreement during the twelve (12) month period prior to the cause of action. iCat Studios shall have no liability for any failure or delay due to matters beyond their reasonable control.
termOfUse.section9: You represent and warrant that (i) your use of our Services will be in strict accordance with the iCat Studios Privacy Policy, with this Agreement, and with all applicable laws and regulations and (ii) your use of our Services will not infringe or misappropriate the intellectual property rights of any third party.
termOfUse.section10: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless iCat Studios, its contractors, and its licensors, and their respective directors, officers, employees, and agents from and against any and all claims and expenses, including attorneys' fees, arising out of your use of our Services, including but not limited to your violation of this Agreement.
termOfUse.section11: These Terms of Service were originally written in English (US). We may translate these terms into other languages. In the event of a conflict between a translated version of these Terms of Service and the English version, the English version will control.
termOfUse.section12a: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between iCat Studios and you concerning the subject matter hereof, and they may only be modified by a written amendment signed by an authorized executive of iCat Studios, or by the posting by iCat Studios of a revised version.
termOfUse.section12b: If any part of this Agreement is held invalid or unenforceable, that part will be construed to reflect the parties' original intent, and the remaining portions will remain in full force and effect. A waiver by either party of any term or condition of this Agreement or any breach thereof, in any one instance, will not waive such term or condition or any subsequent breach thereof.
termOfUse.section13Title: 13. Usage of Potentials: FC26 Career Mode applications, servers & pricing data
termOfUse.section13: Unless given a written permission from Potentials: FC26 Career Mode you are not allowed to scrape, automate or use our API on any of Player Potentials domains, included sub domains. You are not allowed to use our pricing data for any commercial use or paid service.

swapMapPrivacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the SwapMap: Cards, Stickers, TCG mobile application.
swapMapPrivacy.title: Privacy Policy
swapMapPrivacy.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us
swapMapPrivacy.content:
**Last updated: November 20, 2026**
**Application: SwapMap: Cards, Stickers, TCG**
**Developer: iCat Studios**

At iCat Studios ("we", "us", "our"), we respect the privacy of users ("you", "your") of the SwapMap mobile application ("the App"). This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, with whom we share it, and your rights when using our App.

By using the App, you agree to this Privacy Policy.

## 1. Data We Collect

### 1.1 Account Information

When you use Sign in with Apple or Sign in with Google, we receive the following information from Apple or Google:

- **Email address** (Apple provides a relay email if you select "Hide My Email")
- **First name and last name** (Apple provides this only on first sign-in; Google provides it on every sign-in)
- **Provider User ID** — a unique identifier used to recognize your account

### 1.2 Profile Information

Information you provide directly in the App:

- **Display name** (visible to other users in listings, messages, and ratings)
- **Bio** (optional, visible to other users)
- **Avatar** (optional)
- **Region label** (e.g. "Istanbul, Kadıköy") — a coarse, human-readable location label you set during onboarding
- **Approximate coordinates of your region** — see section 1.4 for details on the privacy offset we apply
- **Country and preferred language**
- **Pro subscription status** — whether you have an active Pro membership and its expiration date

### 1.3 Collection and Listing Data

Data you generate while using the App:

- Your **collection inventory** (which stickers/cards you own and how many duplicates, which ones you want)
- **Listings** you publish (Sale, Swap, or Wanted), including title, description, asking price, currency, condition, and items included
- **Offers** you make or receive, including their full history (rounds, requested items, offered items, cash amounts)
- **Conversations and messages** exchanged with other users
- **Ratings and comments** you give or receive
- **Reports** you submit about other users, messages, or listings

### 1.4 Location Data

The App is location-based. We process location data as follows:

- When you grant the location permission, we read your device coordinates **once** to suggest your region during onboarding and to center the map around you. We do not track your location in the background.
- A reverse-geocode (city, district) is performed to suggest a human-readable region label.
- Before storing your listing or profile coordinates on our servers, we apply a **~500 meter random offset** so that your exact location is never published. The map pin shown to other users is the offset coordinate, never your real one.
- You can deny or revoke the location permission at any time from your device settings. The App will continue to work; the map will simply use a default location until you provide one.

### 1.5 Camera and Sticker Scanner

The App includes an optional sticker scanner that uses your device camera to read sticker codes (such as "MEX5", "FWC1", or numeric codes for Adrenalyn-style collections):

- Camera access is requested only when you open the scanner.
- Image processing happens **entirely on your device** using on-device text recognition (Apple Vision on iOS, Google ML Kit on Android). **No camera images are uploaded** to our servers or to any third party.
- Only the recognized text code (e.g. "MEX5") is sent to our server when you confirm and add the card to your collection.
- You can deny or revoke camera access at any time from your device settings; the App's other features continue to function.

### 1.6 Device and App Information

- **Device ID** (for anonymous session management)
- **Operating system** (iOS/Android version)
- **App version and platform** (version code, version name, and whether you are on iOS or Android) — used to provide version-specific support and identify compatibility issues
- **Push notification token** — a unique token issued by Apple Push Notification service (APNs) or Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) so we can deliver new-message notifications, offer notifications, and important announcements. You can disable push notifications at any time from your device settings.

### 1.7 Advertising Identifier

The App may collect your Advertising Identifier (IDFA on iOS, GAID/Advertising ID on Android) only with your explicit consent:

- On iOS, you will see an App Tracking Transparency (ATT) prompt the first time you launch the App. If you choose "Ask App Not to Track," the IDFA is not collected and our advertising partners receive only privacy-preserving information via Apple's SKAdNetwork.
- On Android, the GAID is collected unless you opt out via Settings → Google → Ads → Delete advertising ID.
- When collected, the Advertising Identifier is shared with our advertising partners listed in section 3.4 for ad attribution and frequency capping.

### 1.8 Automatically Collected Data

- **IP address** — used for security purposes, including rate limiting on authentication endpoints and abuse prevention. We do not use IP addresses to build advertising profiles.
- **Error and crash reports** — used to monitor app stability. Reports are filtered to exclude personally identifiable information.

## 2. How We Use Your Data

We use the collected data for the following purposes:

- **Account creation and management:** To let you sign in and use the App
- **Marketplace operation:** To publish your listings, match you with nearby collectors, and let you exchange offers and messages
- **Map and discovery:** To display listings around you and let you search by region, collection, or card
- **Trust and safety:** To process ratings, reports, and blocks, and to suspend accounts that violate our Terms of Use
- **Pro subscription management:** To verify your subscription status and grant access to Pro features
- **Communication:** To send important updates, offer and message notifications, and announcements about the App
- **Account security:** To prevent fraudulent accounts and rate-limit suspicious activity
- **Advertising:** To display advertisements within the App and measure their performance — see section 8 for details
- **Analytics and improvement:** To analyze usage statistics anonymously and improve the App

## 3. Who We Share Your Data With

SwapMap does not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. We share data only with the trusted service providers and advertising partners listed below, and only to the extent necessary to operate the App.

### 3.1 Service Providers

- **Amazon Web Services (AWS)** — Server and database hosting (Frankfurt, Germany)
- **Apple** — Apple Sign-In authentication, Apple Push Notification service (APNs)
- **Google** — Google Sign-In authentication, Firebase Cloud Messaging (push notifications on Android), Google Maps SDK (map rendering)
- **Apple StoreKit / RevenueCat** — Processes Pro subscription purchases and renewals on iOS
- **Google Play Billing / RevenueCat** — Processes Pro subscription purchases and renewals on Android
- **Sentry** — Backend error and exception monitoring. Personally identifiable information filtering is enabled (no email, name, listing content, or message content is sent to Sentry).

These service providers only process data on our behalf and under our instructions.

### 3.2 Legal Requirements

Your data may be shared with authorities in response to a court order, legal investigation, or legal obligation.

### 3.3 Information Visible to Other Users

The following information is visible to other users:

- Your **display name, avatar, bio**
- Your **region label** (e.g. "Istanbul, Kadıköy") and the **offset map pin** (never your exact coordinates)
- Your **listings** (title, description, items, price, condition)
- Your **ratings, trust score, and rating count**
- **Messages and offers** you send to a specific user are visible to that user
- A **Pro membership badge** if you have an active subscription

The following information is **never shown** to other users:

- Your email address
- Your real first and last name
- Your exact (un-offset) coordinates
- Your device information
- Your advertising identifier
- Your subscription expiration date
- The contents of your collection inventory (only the items you choose to put in a listing or offer are revealed)

### 3.4 Advertising Partners

The App displays advertisements through several advertising networks (sometimes called mediation). When you have consented to tracking, your Advertising Identifier and limited technical data may be shared with the partners below for ad delivery, attribution, and frequency capping. Each partner has its own privacy policy:

- **Google AdMob & Google User Messaging Platform** — [policies.google.com/privacy](https://policies.google.com/privacy)
- **AppLovin** — [applovin.com/privacy](https://www.applovin.com/privacy/)
- **Liftoff (Vungle)** — [liftoff.io/privacy-policy](https://liftoff.io/privacy/)
- **Unity Ads** — [unity.com/legal/game-player-and-app-user-privacy-policy](https://unity.com/legal/game-player-and-app-user-privacy-policy)
- **Meta Audience Network** — [facebook.com/about/privacy](https://www.facebook.com/about/privacy)
- **InMobi** — [inmobi.com/privacy-policy](https://www.inmobi.com/privacy-policy)

## 4. Where and How Long We Store Your Data

### 4.1 Data Storage Location

All user data is stored in Amazon Web Services (AWS) Frankfurt (eu-central-1) data centers. We use Amazon RDS PostgreSQL as our database service.

### 4.2 Retention Period

- **Active accounts:** Your data is retained as long as your account remains active
- **Inactive accounts:** Accounts that have not signed in for 2 years are automatically deleted
- **Deleted accounts:** When you delete your account, your personal data is permanently deleted within 30 days (including backups). Messages you sent to other users may be retained in those users' conversation history in an anonymized form to preserve the integrity of their records.
- **Anonymous statistics:** Anonymous aggregate statistics may be retained after deletion (contains no personal information)

## 5. Your Rights

Under GDPR (Europe) and KVKK (Turkey), you have the following rights:

- **Right of access:** Learn what data we process about you
- **Right to rectification:** Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
- **Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten"):** Request deletion of your data
- **Right to restriction of processing:** Limit how your data is processed
- **Right to data portability:** Receive your data in a machine-readable format
- **Right to object:** Object to data processing
- **Right to withdraw consent (advertising tracking):** You may revoke ATT permission on iOS via Settings → Privacy & Security → Tracking, or reset/delete your advertising ID on Android at any time

### How to Delete Your Account

You can delete your account in three ways:

- **In-app:** Profile → Settings → Delete Account
- **Web:** [icatstudios.com/delete-account/swapmap](https://icatstudios.com/delete-account/swapmap)
- **Email:** Send a request to the contact address below

## 6. Children's Privacy

SwapMap is not intended for users under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected personal data from a child under 13, we will delete that data as soon as possible.

For users between 13 and 18, we recommend reviewing this Privacy Policy together with a parent or guardian. Marketplace transactions between users — even in-person sticker swaps — should be supervised by a parent or guardian.

Parents or guardians who believe their child is using the App can contact us.

## 7. Data Security

We take industry-standard security measures to protect your data:

- **HTTPS encryption:** All network traffic is encrypted using SSL/TLS
- **Passwordless authentication:** We do not store passwords; all sign-ins are handled via Apple and Google
- **JWT-based session management:** Sessions are managed with secure, temporary tokens
- **Rate limiting:** Authentication and sensitive endpoints are rate-limited per IP to prevent brute-force and abuse
- **Access control:** Database access is limited to authorized system accounts only
- **Location privacy offset:** Listing and profile coordinates are stored with a ~500m random offset
- **On-device camera processing:** Sticker scanner OCR runs on your device; no images leave your phone
- **Regular security updates:** Our systems are kept up to date

However, please note that no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

## 8. Advertising and Tracking

### 8.1 Advertising in the App

SwapMap is supported in part by advertising. The App displays ads through Google AdMob and additional networks via mediation (AppLovin, Liftoff/Vungle, Unity Ads, Meta Audience Network, InMobi). See section 3.4 for the full partner list.

Ads may include banner and interstitial formats. Pro members enjoy an ad-free experience.

### 8.2 App Tracking Transparency (iOS)

On iOS 14.5 and later, Apple requires us to ask for your permission before tracking you across apps and websites. The first time you launch the App you will see an App Tracking Transparency prompt:

- If you select "Allow", your IDFA may be shared with our advertising partners for personalized ads, attribution, and frequency capping.
- If you select "Ask App Not to Track", your IDFA is not collected. We use Apple's privacy-preserving SKAdNetwork framework for attribution, and ads you see will be non-personalized.

You can change your decision at any time in Settings → Privacy & Security → Tracking.

### 8.3 Android Advertising ID

On Android, your Google Advertising ID (GAID) may be used by our advertising partners. You can reset or delete your advertising ID at any time via Settings → Google → Ads. When deleted, ads will be non-personalized.

### 8.4 Cookies

The SwapMap mobile application does not use browser cookies. Tracking on mobile is governed by the platform-level mechanisms described above, not cookies.

## 9. International Data Transfers

Your data may be processed outside of your home country (AWS Frankfurt — European Union, and the data centers of our advertising partners listed in section 3.4, which may be located outside the EU). These transfers comply with the security standards required by GDPR and KVKK.

## 10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes take effect once published on this page, and the "Last updated" date at the top will be refreshed. Significant changes will be announced via in-app notification.

## 11. Third-Party Content and Trademarks

SwapMap is a community marketplace for collectors of physical sticker albums and trading cards. The App displays sticker codes, set names, player names, team names, league names, and similar identifiers to help users describe the items they own, want, or are trading. These names and any associated trademarks are the property of their respective owners — including but not limited to Panini Group, Topps, Match Attax, FIFA, UEFA, individual football clubs, national federations, players, and other rights holders.

SwapMap is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or in any way officially connected to** any sticker manufacturer, trading-card publisher, sports league, federation, club, organization, or competition referenced in the App. The App does **not** sell or distribute any stickers or cards itself. All third-party names and trademarks are used solely for **identification and descriptive purposes (nominative fair use)** so that collectors can recognize and exchange the items they already physically own.

User-uploaded content (listings, photos, messages) is the responsibility of the user who posted it. SwapMap does not claim ownership of, and does not pre-verify, user-supplied content.

If you are a rights holder and believe that your trademark or copyrighted material is being used incorrectly within the App, please contact us at the email below. We will review the request and respond promptly, removing or replacing the content where appropriate.

## 12. Contact

For questions about this Privacy Policy or data processing requests:

- **Email:** support@icatstudios.com
- **Developer:** iCat Studios
- **Website:** [icatstudios.com](https://icatstudios.com)

Requests under GDPR or KVKK can be sent to the email address above or by mail. We will respond within 30 days.
